title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.240 - Prosecuting attorney to prosecute actions
text:
47.240.  Prosecuting attorney to prosecute actions. — The prosecuting attorneys, respectively, shall commence and prosecute all such actions within their respective counties.
(RSMo 1939 § 13686) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12027; 1919 § 9429; 1909 § 3646
